---
title: "SyNSpec"
generated: true
description: "Static configuration for the greedy-SyN recipe (jit-static)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._syn`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:SyNSpec -->
```python
class SyNSpec(SVFSpec)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:SyNSpec -->
Static configuration for the greedy-SyN recipe (jit-static).

Embeds `._svf.SVFSpec` for the shared schedule / regularisation /
convergence fields (`levels`, `iterations`, `sigma_fluid` /
`sigma_diffusion`, `spacing`, `pyramid_factor` / `pyramid_sigma`,
`boundary_mode`, `representation`, `mode` / `convergence`,
`compute_velocity`); SyN is *symmetric*, so it carries a pair of
displacements / velocities -- `representation` / `compute_velocity`
recover both `forward_velocity` and `inverse_velocity`, and `spacing`
additionally makes the LNCC window physically isotropic.  The SyN-specific
force / step knobs:
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:SyNSpec.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(levels: int = 3, iterations: Union[int, tuple[int, ...]] = 80, sigma_fluid: float = 1.0, sigma_diffusion: float = 1.5, spacing: Optional[Union[float, tuple[float, ...]]] = None, pyramid_factor: float = 2.0, pyramid_sigma: Optional[float] = None, boundary_mode: BoundaryMode = 'nearest', representation: Literal['group', 'algebra'] = 'group', mode: ConvergenceMode = 'fixed', convergence: Convergence = Convergence(), compute_velocity: bool = False, radius: int = 2, step: float = 0.25, step_mode: Literal['clamp', 'normalize'] = 'clamp', n_steps: int = 5) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
